title: Tom Veitch

My brother, Tom Veitch, has passed away from Covid at 80 years of age. Tom Veitch 1941-2022.|archivefile=File:RestInPeaceTomVeitch.png}}</ref>

{{Quote|I feel pretty good about it. It was an opportunity that arose, and I proposed it, found the artists, and pretty much put the whole thing together myself. It was a great time to be doing Star Wars.|Tom Veitch, commenting on his work on ''Tales of the Jedi''|<ref name="WookieepediaInterview">[[Wookieepedia:Interview/Tom Veitch|Interview]] with Tom Veitch on [[Wookieepedia]]</ref>}}
'''Tom Veitch''' ([[September 26]], [[1940s|1941]] – [[February 18]], [[2022]])<ref name="Feb 18, 2022" /> was a comic book writer. He worked on several titles for [[Dark Horse Comics]], including [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''. His brother was [[Rick Veitch]].

In [[2019]],<ref name="Book date">{{Facebook|username=StarWarsInterviews|url=StarWarsInterviews/posts/starwars-darkempire-writer-tom-veitch-is-working-on-a-new-non-fiction-star-wars-/10161587116720461|name=The Star Wars Interviews Book Series|date=2019-03-07|quote=#StarWars #DarkEmpire writer TOM VEITCH is working on a new non-fiction Star Wars book!|archivedate=2023-04-26|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/lUxHb}}</ref> Veitch was writing a book about his work within the ''Star Wars'' franchise, and planned to release it that same year. However, at the time of his death, no such book has been released. However, 16 pages were previewed on [[Star Wars Interviews]].<ref name="Book preview">{{WebCite|url=https://starwarsinterviews.com/reviews/exclusive-16-pages-of-dark-empire-author-tom-veitchs-new-star-wars-book|text=Exclusive: 16 pages of Dark Empire author Tom Veitch's new Star Wars book!|author=[[Dennis Pellegrom]]|work=[[Star Wars Interviews]]|archivedate=20201107235055|nolive=1}}</ref>
